hero.desc: Expert welding & fabrication for gates, railings, ladders and custom metalwork — quality workmanship at prices that make sense.

servicesPreview.label: What We Do
servicesPreview.desc: From decorative grillwork to heavy-duty gates — we fabricate and install with precision.
servicesPreview.grillGatesDesc: Decorative and security grill gates for homes and commercial spaces. Custom designs available.
servicesPreview.houseGatesDesc: Strong, stylish entrance gates for houses and compounds. Both sliding and swinging styles.
servicesPreview.steelLaddersDesc: Fixed and folding steel ladders for rooftop access, lofts, and industrial use.
servicesPreview.railingsDesc: Safety and decorative railings for stairs, balconies, terraces, and corridors.
servicesPreview.customMetalWorksDesc: Any custom fabrication project — shelves, stands, frames, window grills, or unique structures.
servicesPreview.seeAllDesc: Explore our full range of metal fabrication offerings.

whyUs.label: Why Choose Us
whyUs.desc: Sri Senthur Velan Welding Works has built a strong reputation across Sernthamaram, Surandai and nearby villages for delivering durable metalwork that combines craftsmanship with affordability.
whyUs.skilledDesc: Every weld and cut is done with care and experience — no shortcuts, no compromise on strength.
whyUs.affordableDesc: We believe quality metalwork shouldn't break your budget. Transparent quotes with no hidden charges.
whyUs.customDesc: Have a design in mind? We bring your ideas to life with custom fabrication tailored to your space.
whyUs.onsiteDesc: We don't just fabricate — we deliver and install, ensuring a perfect fit every time.
whyUs.localDesc: Proudly serving Sernthamaram, Surandai and surrounding areas with a name you can trust.

testimonials.label: Client Words
testimonials.t1: "Excellent work! The house gate they made for us is very strong and looks beautiful. The price was very reasonable compared to others."
testimonials.t2: "I got my staircase railings and window grills done. Very neat finish, on-time delivery and they installed everything perfectly. Highly recommended!"
testimonials.t3: "Got a custom metal shelf and ladder for my shop. Good quality steel, solid welding. Will come back for more work."

cta.title: Ready to Start Your Project?

footer.desc: Expert welding and fabrication services serving Sernthamaram, Surandai and nearby areas. Quality work at affordable prices.

servicesPage.heroDesc: Custom metal fabrication & welding services for homes, businesses, and beyond.
servicesPage.grillLead: Secure your home with beautifully crafted grill gates. We design and fabricate grills that combine security with aesthetics.
servicesPage.grillDesc: Whether you need simple iron bar grills or ornamental designs with patterns, we fabricate to your exact measurements and preferences. Our grill gates are built using quality MS (mild steel) with proper welding and finishing.
servicesPage.grillF3: ✦ Window grills, door grills, compound grills
servicesPage.houseLead: Make a strong first impression with a well-crafted house gate. We build entrance gates that are both beautiful and durable.
servicesPage.houseDesc: From simple single-leaf gates to grand double-door compound gates, we handle it all. Each gate is welded strong, finished well, and installed to stand the test of time and weather.
servicesPage.houseF5: ✦ Durable anti-rust paint or powder coat
servicesPage.ladderLead: Strong, safe, and long-lasting steel ladders for rooftop access, loft access, and industrial use — built to carry weight and withstand years of use.
servicesPage.ladderDesc: We fabricate fixed wall-mounted ladders as well as portable folding ladders. All ladders are built to safe dimensions with anti-slip steps and proper anchoring points.
servicesPage.railingLead: Safety and style — our railings keep your family safe on stairs, balconies, and terraces while adding a polished look to your home.
servicesPage.railingDesc: We fabricate railings for all types of stairways, open balconies, rooftop terraces, and corridors. Available in classic box-pipe style, decorative patterns, or modern minimalist designs.
servicesPage.railingF5: ✦ MS pipe, flat bar, and square bar options
servicesPage.customLead: Have a unique project or an idea in your head? We take on custom fabrication jobs of all kinds — if it's made of metal, we can build it.
servicesPage.customDesc: Our experience and equipment allow us to take on almost any metal fabrication project. From shop display stands to agricultural equipment frames, we work with you to deliver exactly what you need.
servicesPage.step1Desc: Call or WhatsApp us with your requirements. Describe what you need, or send photos for reference.
servicesPage.step2Desc: We visit your location, take exact measurements, discuss design options, and give you a transparent quote.
servicesPage.step3Desc: We fabricate your item in our workshop using quality materials and skilled welding.
servicesPage.step4Desc: We deliver and install at your site, ensuring everything fits perfectly and is properly secured.
servicesPage.ctaDesc: Contact us with your requirements and get a free, no-obligation estimate.

aboutPage.heroDesc: A local welding workshop built on skill, honesty, and community trust.
aboutPage.introLead: We are a local fabrication workshop proudly serving the communities of Sernthamaram, Surandai, and the surrounding villages with expert metalwork at fair prices.
aboutPage.introP1: Sri Senthur Velan Welding Works was founded with one simple goal: to provide high-quality metal fabrication to local families and businesses without overcharging them. Over the years, we have grown into one of the most trusted welding shops in this area — known for our clean welds, accurate measurements, timely delivery, and honest dealings.
aboutPage.introP2: We handle every project personally, from taking the first measurement to completing the final installation. Whether it's a simple window grill or a large compound gate, we give every job the same level of attention and craftsmanship.
aboutPage.v1Desc: We never compromise on the quality of materials or workmanship. Every joint is welded strong and every surface is finished with care.
aboutPage.v2Desc: Our prices are transparent and affordable. We believe everyone deserves good metalwork, not just those who can overpay for it.
aboutPage.v3Desc: No hidden charges. No false promises. We quote what we charge and deliver what we promise — every single time.
aboutPage.v4Desc: We respect your time and commitments. We work to complete and install on the schedule we've agreed upon.
aboutPage.v5Desc: We are part of this community. We serve our neighbors and take pride in seeing our work in homes across the area.
aboutPage.v6Desc: Every home and customer is different. We listen carefully and create solutions that fit your specific needs and space.
aboutPage.ownerQuote: "I started this workshop to bring quality metalwork to our own community. Every gate I build, every railing I weld — I build it like it's going in my own home."
aboutPage.ownerBio: The founder of Sri Senthur Velan Welding Works is a skilled and experienced welder who has dedicated his career to the craft. Starting out as an apprentice and learning every aspect of metal fabrication, he established this workshop to serve the local community with the same dedication he would give his own family.
aboutPage.ownerReputation: His passion for precision and his reputation for honest business have made Sri Senthur Velan Welding Works a household name in Sernthamaram and Surandai.
aboutPage.areaDesc: We primarily serve Sernthamaram, Surandai, and the surrounding villages and towns. Call us to confirm if we cover your location.
aboutPage.areaSernthamaramDesc: Primary service area. Full services available including on-site measurement and installation.
aboutPage.areaSurandaiDesc: Primary service area. Full services available including on-site measurement and installation.
aboutPage.areaNearbyDesc: We also serve surrounding villages and towns. Call us to check availability for your area.
aboutPage.ctaDesc: Contact us today for a free site visit and estimate.

galleryPage.heroDesc: Browse through our completed projects — from gates and grills to railings and custom metalwork.

contactPage.heroDesc: Get a free quote or ask us anything. We're always happy to help.
contactPage.talkDesc: Have a project in mind? Call us, WhatsApp us, or fill in the form and we'll get back to you with a free estimate. No obligations, no pressure.
contactPage.formDesc: Fill in the details below and we'll contact you with a free estimate.
contactPage.placeholderMessage: Describe your project — size, design preference, timeline, any special requirements...
contactPage.formNote: We'll call you back within 24 hours. No spam, promise.
contactPage.successDesc: Thank you! We've received your request and will call you back soon.
contactPage.mapNote: Replace this section with an embedded Google Map of your workshop location.
contactPage.faq1A: Yes! We offer free site visits and estimates. Just call or WhatsApp us with your requirements and we'll arrange a convenient time to visit and measure.
contactPage.faq2A: Depending on the job, most standard items like gates and grills are ready within 3–7 working days after measurement and confirmation. Larger or more complex projects may take longer — we'll give you a clear timeline upfront.
contactPage.faq3A: Yes! We handle complete delivery and installation. Our team will ensure everything is properly fitted and secure at your location.
contactPage.faq4Q: Can I provide my own design?
contactPage.faq4A: Absolutely! If you have a design in mind — whether it's a sketch, a photo reference, or a specific idea — we'll work with you to bring it to life. Custom designs are welcome.
contactPage.faq5A: We primarily serve Sernthamaram, Surandai, and the nearby villages and towns. Call us with your location and we'll confirm whether we can reach you.
contactPage.faq6Q: What types of metal do you use?
contactPage.faq6A: We primarily work with mild steel (MS) for most standard fabrication. We also work with square hollow section (SHS), round pipe, flat bar, and can accommodate stainless steel (SS) options for premium requirements.
